projectDescription: An AI agent framework for OpenCode that delivers plan-first, approval-gated development workflows with a context system that teaches agents your coding patterns for repeatable, production-ready code generation.
keyFeatures: Plan-first workflow with mandatory approval gates before any code execution
Context System (MVI principle) that loads your coding patterns for 80% token reduction
ContextScout smart pattern discovery that ranks and loads only relevant context files
Editable agents as plain markdown files — no compilation, no vendor lock-in
Multi-language support: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, C#, and more
Model-agnostic: Claude, GPT, Gemini, local models — any OpenCode-supported provider
Team-ready shared context via git-committed .opencode/context/ directory
SystemBuilder wizard for generating domain-specific custom AI systems
ExternalScout for fetching live, version-accurate external library documentation
8 specialized subagents (ContextScout, TaskManager, CoderAgent, TestEngineer, CodeReviewer, BuildAgent, DocWriter, ExternalScout)
publicApiSurface: /add-context — interactive wizard to define project coding patterns
oac CLI (packages/cli) — init, add, list, status, update, apply, doctor subcommands
registry.json — component registry for agents, subagents, commands, contexts, tools
